name: Johanne & Peter's Diet Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Make your favorite pizza dough.
2. Roll out on a floured surface.
3. Fit onto an aluminum pizza pan (do not use oil).
4. Cut off excess dough from the sides.
5. Pinch up the sides to make a crust.
6. Spread plain crushed tomatoes over the dough as the sauce.
7. Put your toppings on as desired.
8. Top with Low fat cheese.
9. Bake at 450°F for 15-20 minutes, or until the cheese is bubbly and the crust is brown.
Note: The taste of the vegetables will compensate for the lack of seasonings in the sauce. Be creative with your toppings, but remember that olives are caloric and anchovies are usually packed in oil. Pepperoni is NOT a meat you want to be eating if you are trying to lose weight. The reason for the absence in seasonings in the sauce is because I have found when I buy pizza sauce, it usually contains oil. You may season your crushed tomatoes if you like.
